top3.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE m.member_id IN (
    SELECT e.link_to_member
    FROM expense e
    WHERE e.cost > 100
);

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100
GROUP BY m.member_id;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE m.member_id IN (
    SELECT e.link_to_member
    FROM expense e
    WHERE e.cost > 100
);

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100
GROUP BY m.member_id;

final.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, maj.major_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > 100;
